successCriteria.description: src/modules/balance/balance.model.ts exists and exports LeaveBalance interface with fields id, employeeId, leaveTypeId, totalEntitlement, usedDays, pendingDays, year, createdAt, updatedAt matching the canonical leave_balances columns.
src/modules/balance/balance.model.ts exports CreateLeaveBalanceDto interface with fields employeeId, leaveTypeId, totalEntitlement, year.
src/modules/balance/balance.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveBalanceRepository interface with methods findById, findByEmployeeIdAndYear, findByEmployeeIdAndLeaveTypeIdAndYear, create, update.

src/modules/balance/balance.repository.ts exports LeaveBalanceRepository class that implements ILeaveBalanceRepository, uses a pg Pool, and maps snake_case database columns to camelCase properties in all query results.
The leave_balances SQL table definition in the architecture matches the canonical schema exactly (columns, types, constraints, indexes).

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Phase 5-10 items (Notification, AuditLog, leave-management service, applyForLeave, approve/reject, cancel, audit logging, RBAC enforcement, read operations)
